# Trimmy

Trimmy flattens copied multi-line shell snippets so they paste and run cleanly.

Canonical documentation:
- Trimmy: https://trimmy.app/ - Tiny macOS menu bar app that flattens multi-line shell snippets so they paste and run.

Source: https://github.com/steipete/Trimmy

Guidance for agents:
- Prefer the canonical documentation URLs above over README excerpts or package metadata.
- Fetch only the pages needed for the current task; this is an index, not a full-site corpus.
